info.title: TCGGO API Documentation v1
info.description: A powerful and comprehensive API for accessing Trading Card Game data. Get real-time prices, card information, product details, inventory management, and market trends for Pokémon TCG and other trading card games.

default.name: x-rapidapi-key
default.description:
Get your API key on RapidAPI

For Inventory API Key: Go to your Profile (scroll to "Inventory API Key" section) or visit API Key page. Click "Generate API Key" (key is shown only once - copy it immediately!)

get.description:
Get a paginated list of the authenticated user's inventories with financial summary.

**Authentication:** Requires Inventory API Key

**Where to get your Inventory API Key:**
- Go to your Profile page: https://www.tcggo.com/profile (scroll to "Inventory API Key" section)
- Or visit the API Key page: https://www.tcggo.com/api-key
- Click "Generate API Key" (key is shown only once - copy it immediately!)

**Example:**
```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer tcggo_inv_YOUR_KEY" \
     https://www.tcggo.com/inventories
```

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination.

schema.description: Page number for pagination.

parameters.name: rapidapi_tcggo_key
parameters.description: Inventory API Key (alternative to Authorization header).

schema.description: Inventory API Key (alternative to Authorization header).

Get detailed information for a specific inventory, including paginated items with pricing data.

**Authentication:** Requires Inventory API Key (see controller description above)

get.description:
Get comprehensive statistics and chart data for the inventory.
Includes total value, bought value, profit/loss, item counts, and price changes.

**Authentication:** Requires Inventory API Key (see controller description above)

parameters.description: Number of days for chart data (default 30).

schema.description: Number of days for chart data (default 30).

parameters.description: The ID of the inventory.

post.description:
Add a single card or sealed product to the inventory.

**Authentication:** Requires Inventory API Key (see controller description above)

language.description: Language code: en, de, fr, es, it. Default: en.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the inventory.

put.description:
Update an existing item in the inventory (quantity, price, language).

**Authentication:** Requires Inventory API Key (see controller description above)

language.description: Language code: en, de, fr, es, it.

delete.description:
Remove a specific item entry from the inventory.

**Authentication:** Requires Inventory API Key (see controller description above)

get.description:
**Quick Examples:**
- Find by CardMarket ID: `/pokemon/cards/search?cardmarket_id=362170`
- Find by PokemonTCG ID: `/pokemon/cards/search?tcgid=sv3-223`
- Find by card number: `/pokemon/cards/search?card_number=gg12`
- **Powerful combo**: `/pokemon/cards/search?name=Charizard&card_number=125`
- **Batch lookup**: `/pokemon/cards/search?ids=3852,3853,3854`

get.summary: Check if a Cardmarket URL is linked to an item (single or sealed product) in this game

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Full or path-only Cardmarket URL.
parameters.example:
https://www.cardmarket.com/en/Pokemon/Products/Singles/Some-Set/Example-Card

When found: `exists` true plus `id`, `name`, `episode` (same shape as card list), `tcggo_url`,
and `tcggo_cm_low` (EUR cmLow from TCGGO per language: EN, DE, FR, ES, IT when present).

schema.description: Full or path-only Cardmarket URL.
schema.example:
https://www.cardmarket.com/en/Pokemon/Products/Singles/Some-Set/Example-Card

When found: `exists` true plus `id`, `name`, `episode` (same shape as card list), `tcggo_url`,
and `tcggo_cm_low` (EUR cmLow from TCGGO per language: EN, DE, FR, ES, IT when present).

url.description: Must not be greater than 2048 characters.

parameters.name: game
parameters.description: The game slug (e.g., pokemon, lorcana).

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of all cards (specifically "singles").
This is the main endpoint, but you can also use more specific filtering endpoints.
Cards are sorted by episode release date (newest first) and then by card ID.

**Quick Examples:**
- Find by CardMarket ID: `/pokemon/cards?cardmarket_id=362170`
- Find by PokemonTCG ID: `/pokemon/cards?tcgid=sv3-223`
- Find by card number: `/pokemon/cards?card_number=125` or `/pokemon/cards?card_number=gg12`
- **Powerful combo**: `/pokemon/cards?name=Charizard&card_number=125`
- **Batch lookup**: `/pokemon/cards?ids=3852,3853,3854` or `/pokemon/cards?tcgids=sv3-223,sv3-224,sv2-113`

parameters.description: The page number to retrieve.

schema.description: The page number to retrieve.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of items per page (up to 100 when filtering by episode, otherwise 20).

schema.description: Number of items per page (up to 100 when filtering by episode, otherwise 20).

get.description:
Retrieves detailed information for a single card including abilities, attacks, and flavor text.

**Response includes:**
- Card attributes (name, hp, rarity, supertype, tcgid, card_number)
- `flavor_text` - The card's flavor/lore text
- `abilities` - Array of Pokémon abilities with name, damage, and description
- `attacks` - Array of attacks with name, damage, and description
- Prices, episode, artist, and external links

parameters.name: game
parameters.description: The game slug (e.g., pokemon, lorcana).

parameters.description: The ID of the card.

get.summary: Get Historical Prices by ID, Cardmarket ID, or TCG ID
get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of historical prices for a card or product identified by id, cardmarket_id, or tcgid.
By default, Cardmarket Low is returned for EN/DE/FR/ES/IT plus TCG Player Market.
Use the `lang` query parameter to return a single Cardmarket language as `cm_low`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Filter by internal item ID.

schema.description: Filter by internal item ID.

parameters.name: cardmarket_id
parameters.description: Filter by Cardmarket ID.

schema.description: Filter by Cardmarket ID.

parameters.name: tcgid
parameters.description: Filter by TCG ID (pokemontcg-id).

schema.description: Filter by TCG ID (pokemontcg-id).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to retrieve.

schema.description: The page number to retrieve.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: The start date for the filter (YYYY-MM-DD).

schema.description: The start date for the filter (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: The end date for the filter (YYYY-MM-DD).

schema.description: The end date for the filter (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The sort order for dates. Options: 'asc' (oldest first), 'desc' (newest first). Default: 'desc'.

schema.description: The sort order for dates. Options: 'asc' (oldest first), 'desc' (newest first). Default: 'desc'.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional Cardmarket language filter. Supported: en, de, fr, es, it. When set, response `cm_low` contains only selected language.

schema.description: Optional Cardmarket language filter. Supported: en, de, fr, es, it.

parameters.name: game
parameters.description: The game slug (e.g., pokemon, lorcana).

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of historical prices for a specific card, grouped by date.
By default, Cardmarket Low is returned for EN/DE/FR/ES/IT plus TCG Player Market.
Use the `lang` query parameter to return a single Cardmarket language as `cm_low`.

parameters.name: itemId

get.description:
Check that the service is up. If everything is okay, you'll get a 200 OK response.

Otherwise, the request will fail with a 400 error, and a response listing the failed services.
